blocks.value: Spot Copy Trading lets you automatically follow the trades of skilled traders on 1MAX. Once you pick a trader and allocate funds, your account mirrors their spot market trades in real time.

value: Trades are copied automatically from selected professional traders.
You control how much to invest, while the system executes trades for you.
Great for beginners or anyone who can’t watch the markets constantly.

faqs.question: 2. What should I expect when I stop copying a trader?

blocks.value: When you decide to stop Copy Trading, all the positions in your copy portfolio will be sold at the current market price. The final amount you receive may differ slightly because of real-time market price changes during the sell process.

faqs.question: 3. What can cause a copy trade to fail?

blocks.value: In certain situations, copy trades might not go through because of platform safeguards or trading restrictions.

value: Your Balance Is Not Enough – You don’t have enough funds in your account to execute the trade.
The Order Size Is Too Small – The amount you are trying to copy is below the platform’s minimum order size.
Price Spread Difference Is Too Large – The difference between the trader’s price and the market price exceeds the allowed slippage.
Token Copy Limit Reached – The maximum amount of a token that can be copied on the platform has already been reached.
Partially Filled Orders – Only fully completed buy orders are copied; partially filled or canceled orders will not be executed in your account.

faqs.question: 4. What is the minimum deposit to start a Spot Copy Trade?

blocks.value: You need to deposit at least 10 USDT into your spot copy trading account before you start copying.

faqs.question: 5. Is my copy trading account linked to my main spot account?

blocks.value: No. Your copy trading funds are kept separate from your main spot account.

value: Fixed Amount: Each copied trade uses a fixed margin amount set by the follower.
Fixed Ratio: The follower’s position size is calculated proportionally based on the trader’s position size.

blocks.value: The actual copied size is also affected by minimum order requirements and available margin.

value: Are there any fees for Spot Copy Trading?

blocks.value: Fees are deducted automatically and there is no additional service fee. However, you need pay:
